policy: Keep manifest metadata in Git; store heavy PDF/ZIP assets in LFS or external versioned storage.

assets.preferred_storage: Git LFS or external versioned object storage
assets.restore_note: Restore this file from external storage using the exact path and sha256 before regenerating the reference package.
